youtube_16x9.name: YouTube 16x9
youtube_16x9.safe_text_zone: Keep headline text inside the centered 80% width and 70% height.
youtube_16x9.recommended_use: YouTube video thumbnail and widescreen previews.

vertical_9x16.name: Vertical 9x16
vertical_9x16.safe_text_zone: Keep text in the middle 70% height and away from top and bottom UI overlays.

square_1x1.name: Square 1x1
square_1x1.safe_text_zone: Keep text inside the centered 80% square.
square_1x1.recommended_use: Feed post, carousel cover, and square social preview.

feed_4x5.name: Feed 4x5
feed_4x5.safe_text_zone: Keep text inside the centered 80% width and 75% height.
feed_4x5.recommended_use: Tall feed post and creator announcement graphic.

story_9x16.name: Story 9x16
story_9x16.safe_text_zone: Keep text away from the top 250px and bottom 320px.
story_9x16.recommended_use: Story frame, vertical cover, and mobile-first promo artwork.

substack_header.name: Substack Header
substack_header.safe_text_zone: Keep title text inside the centered 75% width.
substack_header.recommended_use: Newsletter header, essay hero, and publication preview.

podcast_cover.name: Podcast Cover
podcast_cover.safe_text_zone: Keep title and host text inside the centered 70% square.
podcast_cover.recommended_use: Podcast cover art and show tile.
